{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Mirage: 6s, Awakened}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Babbage Engine
|rank=SS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=04-27
|source=Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
|description=On Apr 27, 1847 AD, Babbage invented this machine that almost changed the world. The Difference Engine is the result of Babbage's lifelong research. This is not an ordinary calculator. It's a machine used to tabulate polynomial functions.

Unfortunately, Babbage couldn't find anyone willing to contribute to his work, so Difference Engine No. 2 stayed on paper. More than a hundred years later, the machine was recreated from his design. Although it is no match for today's computers, it's still able to compute common engineering and scientific mathematical functions, proving that Babbage's design was precise.
|fame=65
|art=71
|fth=50
|civ=60
|tech=101
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +80<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Snail HP +30<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +120<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Snail HP +400<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +160<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +16<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +240<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +24<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss5=Snail HP +800<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +320<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +32<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss6=Snail HP +1,100<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +440<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +44<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Snail HP +1,100<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail HP +440<br>Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail ATK +44<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50<br>Snail HP +1,000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, DMG +30%
|skill2=[[File:Britland skill III.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x INTEL Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Timemachine skill III.png|50px]] Place in Time Machine: This Relic's TECH +15
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:DMG Boosts]]
[[Category:Exploration INTEL Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Skill]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Organ Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Organs]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Time Machine LVL]]
[[Category:Mechanic Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Mech Boost]]
